title: UpDown&Shot
description:
In a quiet, secluded bar, a humanoid dealer awaits you. Can you defeat the dealer?In this game, you face the dealer in a deadly hybrid of Russian roulette and an up/down number guessing game. Each card you choose consumes a chance. If you guess correctly, the dealer pulls the trigger on themselves; if you guess wrong with no chances remaining, you will be the one to fire.

Unlike traditional Russian roulette, you can directly control the number and placement of bullets, manipulating the odds in your favor. Various items and perks are available to help you narrow down the correct number—use them wisely and secure your victory.
description_short: Load the revolver and guess the dealer's number. Wrong? Then put the barrel to your head and pull the trigger.
